title: Yaw's Base Hub
location: Ussher Town motor yard — back room
tagline: My grandfather marched unarmed. I will not bury four more children in his name.

warBoard.label: Tactical War Board
warBoard.description: Select the next district to liberate. Pin routes, timing, and extraction on the Accra Freedom Grid.

workshop.label: Workshop Station
workshop.description: Upgrade Kofi's gear and repair the cell's tools. Oil, bolts, and patience — not martyrdom.

registry.label: Registry Desk
registry.description: Review intercepted colonial documents. Truth is ammunition — file what the world must read.

warBoardDistricts.label: Makola / James Town Routes
warBoardDistricts.summary: Sector 1 slums — slip constable cordons after Crossroads.

warBoardDistricts.label: Salaga Market Uprising
warBoardDistricts.summary: Sector 2 markets — AWAM demolition, protect stalls.

warBoardDistricts.label: Kaneshie Lines
warBoardDistricts.summary: Sector 2 warehouse fires — escort Kofi, collect evidence.

warBoardDistricts.label: Victoriaborg Infiltration
warBoardDistricts.summary: Sector 3 admin zone — Rowe Road corridor, Kwesi's manifests.

warBoardDistricts.label: Ussher Yard Stand
warBoardDistricts.summary: Sector 1 hub — hold Yaw's yard; all four must survive.

workshopUpgrades.name: Recoil Brace
workshopUpgrades.description: Yaw fits a strap from spare belt webbing — Kofi's aim steadies.
workshopUpgrades.yawLine: Hold the rifle like you carry loads — against your bone, not your fear.

workshopUpgrades.name: Market Bandolier
workshopUpgrades.description: Extra pouches from mammy-truck canvas — faster follow-up shots.
workshopUpgrades.yawLine: My grandfather carried ammunition he was never allowed to fire. You will learn faster.

workshopUpgrades.name: Field Roll Kit
workshopUpgrades.description: Oil the hinges on Kofi's dodges — tighter rolls under constable fire.
workshopUpgrades.yawLine: Roll small. The yard taught me that.

workshopUpgrades.name: Oil & Bolt Repair
workshopUpgrades.description: Restore wirecutters, satchel clasps, and Araba's iron rod wrap.
workshopUpgrades.yawLine: Tools don't march. They keep marchers alive.

registryDocuments.title: Makola Alley Sketch
registryDocuments.text: Kojo's hand-drawn drainage cuts from Makola to James Town — constable blind spots marked in charcoal.

registryDocuments.title: AWAM Boycott Ledger
registryDocuments.text: Stall closures under Nii Kwabena Bonne III's boycott — proof AWAM monopoly strangled Salaga before the Crossroads shots.

registryDocuments.title: Kaneshie Warehouse Seal
registryDocuments.text: Colonial import stamp from AWAM depot — Crown-backed price gouging in black ink.

registryDocuments.title: Patrol Rotation — Ring Road
registryDocuments.text: Kwesi's stolen page: constables thin on Ring Road after midnight. Curfew window extended for extraction.

registryDocuments.title: AWAM Depot Lock Codes
registryDocuments.text: Night guard forgets the third lock on the side door — structural weak points noted for squad assault.

registryDocuments.title: Imray Suppression Order
registryDocuments.text: Superintendent Colin Imray's signature on an order to block the veterans' petition — witness ammunition for the Watson Commission.

registryDocuments.title: Arrest Schedule — UGCC
registryDocuments.text: Dr. Kwame Nkrumah's name circled in red. They will arrest leadership if the riots succeed.

registryDocuments.title: Ussher Yard Witness Record
registryDocuments.text: Documented: youth cell preserved innocent stalls, targeted AWAM, and preserved Imray's suppression order for inquiry.
